case_title: NGO, LYAN SENG vs. LORANZI, GERALDO et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LORANZI, GERALDO ESBINOSA, GUILLERNO
